transition_note: Action 12 promotes the local truth ledger as the active current-head witness and purges main-bound live-truth responsibility. Published-head self-convergence remains unresolved until the ledger becomes an admissible published authority plane.
authoritative_when: authority_mode == TRANSITIONAL_AUTHORITATIVE or SETTLED_AUTHORITATIVE as supported by settled_truth_source_receipt
last_synced_head_sha matches settled_truth_source_receipt pinned_head_sha for the active proof class
authority_convergence_receipt status is PASS before TRUTHFUL_GREEN may be claimed
H1 may only be true when published_head_self_convergence_receipt.proof_class == PUBLISHED_HEAD_SELF_CONVERGENCE_PROVEN
